subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Sacred Threshold! Your letter dated the 7th of Ramadan 1339 was received, and from its contents expressing servitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس نامه شما که بتاریخ ۷ رمضان ۳۳۹ بود رسید و از مضمون عبودیت
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause
